gameTitle: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past

achievements.title: Fighter
achievements.description: Obtain the Fighter's Sword and Shield.
achievements.author: HenrySwanson

achievements.title: Illuminating
achievements.description: Obtain the Lamp from the cell block.

achievements.title: Sanctuary
achievements.description: Take the Princess to the safety of Sanctuary.

achievements.title: Spider Bonus
achievements.description: Get a red rupee from a hoarder.
achievements.author: JAM

achievements.title: Bombs
achievements.description: Acquire some Bombs.
achievements.author: HenrySwanson

achievements.title: Bottle
achievements.description: Acquire a Magic Bottle.
achievements.author: HenrySwanson

achievements.title: Bug Catcher
achievements.description: Obtain the Bug Catching Net.
achievements.author: HenrySwanson

achievements.title: It's-a Me ....Hario?
achievements.description: Unleash the rupees from a portrait of a famous plumber's Hylian doppelganger.

achievements.title: Kamicucco!
achievements.description: Start a cucco frenzy.

achievements.title: A Cure For the Muteness
achievements.description: Expose the "mute" man near the desert.

achievements.title: Toppo the Line Thief
achievements.description: Make Toppo drop an item.
achievements.author: JAM

achievements.title: A Friend in Need is a Friend Indeed
achievements.description: Be rewarded for saving a helpless life.

achievements.title: A Fishy Exchange
achievements.description: Sell a fish to a merchant.
achievements.author: JAM

achievements.title: Magic Powder
achievements.description: Obtain the Magic Powder from the witch's apprentice.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: Granny's Coming Along For the Ride
achievements.description: Take a trusting old lady with you on your journey.

achievements.title: A Fowl Date For Link
achievements.description: Turn a cucco into a woman and see what she has to say.
achievements.author: JAM

achievements.title: Icy
achievements.description: Obtain the Ice Rod.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: All Quiet on the Eastern Front
achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in the Eastern Palace.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Toying with the Red Knight
achievements.description: Kill the Red Armos Knight of the Eastern Palace using only the boomerang and collect the Pendant of Courage.

achievements.title: Bested Armos Knights
achievements.description: Defeat all the Armos Knights in the Eastern Palace without being harmed.

achievements.title: Golden Honey Friend
achievements.description: Release the Good Bee from its hidden home and stick it in a bottle.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Pendant of Courage
achievements.description: Acquire the Pendant of Courage.
achievements.author: HenrySwanson

achievements.title: The Joy of Entomology
achievements.description: Sell a rare bug to a merchant.

achievements.title: Book of Prayer
achievements.description: Obtain the Book of Mudora.

achievements.title: Lightning Link
achievements.description: Catch the running man in Kakariko village.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Lost Woods Winner
achievements.description: Win the 300 rupee prize in the Lost Woods Treasure Chest Gambling Game
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Despoiled the Desert
achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in the Desert Palace.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Masonry Maneuver
achievements.description: Survive the onslaught of all flying tiles without taking damage or hiding in a doorway. (No Cape or Cane of Byrna allowed.)
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Worm Kebabs
achievements.description: Kill the Lanmolas of the Desert Palace dealing all damage with arrows, then collect the Pendant of Power.

achievements.title: Bested Lanmolas
achievements.description: Defeat all three Lanmolas in the Desert Palace without being harmed.

achievements.title: Pendant of Power
achievements.description: Acquire the Pendant of Power.

achievements.title: Overpriced Merchandise
achievements.description: Obtain Zora's Flippers.

achievements.title: The Magic of the Boom
achievements.description: Obtain the Magical Boomerang.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: Magical Shield
achievements.description: Upgrade the Fighter's Shield to the Red Shield without buying it.

achievements.title: This One's on the House
achievements.description: Be rewarded for your honesty with a bottleful of Medicine of Magic.

achievements.title: Mirror World
achievements.description: Obtain the Magic Mirror.

achievements.title: Hera's Treasure
achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in the Tower of Hera.

achievements.description: Defeat Moldorm in the Tower of Hera within 20 seconds. (Must have Fighter Sword, may not have Hammer)

achievements.title: Bested Moldorm
achievements.description: Defeat Moldorm in the Tower of Hera without being harmed.

achievements.title: Pendant of Wisdom
achievements.description: Acquire the Pendant of Wisdom.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: The Sword of Masters
achievements.description: Obtain the Master Sword.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: Castle Caper
achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in Hyrule Castle and its sewers.

achievements.title: You Really Bug Me Out
achievements.description: Defeat Agahnim in Hyrule Castle Tower without unsheathing your sword.

achievements.description: Defeat Agahnim in Hyrule Castle without being harmed.

achievements.title: Coward!
achievements.description: Have Agahnim transport you to the Dark World.

achievements.description: Unleash the rupees from an Agahnim statue.

achievements.description: Try to draw Kiki into the Light World.

achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in the Palace of Darkness.

achievements.title: Mallet and Skewer
achievements.description: Crack the Helmasaur's face Shield using only the hammer, then deal the rest of the damage with a silver arrow.

achievements.title: Bested Helmasaur King
achievements.description: Defeat Helmasaur King without being harmed without using the Magic Cape or Cane of Byrna.

achievements.title: Crystal in the Dark
achievements.description: Free the maiden from the Palace of Darkness.

achievements.title: Cursed Magic
achievements.description: Obtain the magic enhancement.

achievements.title: A Link Between Jobs
achievements.description: Get reprimanded for doing your descendant's job.

achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in the Swamp Palace.

achievements.description: Defeat Arrghus's final phase dealing damage only with the Ice Rod then rescue the maiden.

achievements.description: Defeat Arrghus without being harmed without using the Magic Cape or Cane of Byrna.

achievements.title: Crystal in the Swamp
achievements.description: Free the maiden from the Swamp Palace.

achievements.title: A Cape Not Just For Titans
achievements.description: Get the Magic Cape without having the Titan's Mitt.

achievements.title: You Can't See Me
achievements.description: Obtain the Magic Cape.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: He's a Golddigger
achievements.description: Earn 100 rupees or more in the digging minigame. (Must have room for all of them in your purse!)

achievements.description: Achieve a perfect score at the Archery Minigame.

achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in Skull Woods.

achievements.description: Free the maiden from the Skull Woods.

achievements.description: Bring the maiden in Thieves' Town to both places where she will refuse to go further.

achievements.description: Defeat Blind using only the Cane of Somaria then rescue the maiden.

achievements.description: Defeat Blind without being harmed without using the Magic Cape or Cane of Byrna.

achievements.description: Free the maiden from Thieves' Town.

achievements.description: Obtain all four Magic Bottles.

achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in the Ice Palace.

achievements.description: Defeat Kholdstare in the Ice Palace using only the Fire Rod to damage it then rescue the maiden.

achievements.title: Bested Kholdstare
achievements.description: Defeat Kholdstare without being harmed without using the Magic Cape or Cane of Byrna.

achievements.description: Free the maiden from the Ice Palace.

achievements.description: Fulfill the flute boy's final wish and grant him eternal rest.

achievements.description: Free the bird from the center of Kakariko village.

achievements.title: Mined the Mire
achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in Misery Mire.

achievements.title: A Bomb for Sore Eyes, An Arrow for the Star Pupil
achievements.description: Defeat Vitreous's little eyes by damaging them only with bombs, kill the big eye with only arrows, then rescue the maiden.

achievements.title: Bested Vitreous
achievements.description: Defeat Vitreous without being harmed without using the Magic Cape or Cane of Byrna.

achievements.title: Crystal in the Mire
achievements.description: Free the maiden from Misery Mire.

achievements.description: Unleash the rupees from Turtle Rock.

achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in Turtle Rock.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Elemental Master: Ice, Fire, and... Hammer?
achievements.description: Completely destroy the Trinexx's Fire Head with the Ice Rod, then completely destroy the Ice Head with the Fire Rod, then Hammer the snake to death.

achievements.title: Bested Trinexx
achievements.description: Defeat Trinexx without being harmed without using the Magic Cape or Cane of Byrna.

achievements.description: Free the maiden from Turtle Rock.

achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in the Dark World excluding dungeons.

achievements.description: Obtain all maps and compasses.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Boarglary
achievements.description: Open all treasure chests in Ganon's Tower.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Bringing a Hammer to a Magic Fight
achievements.description: Defeated Agahnim in Ganon's Tower without using a sword or bug net.

achievements.title: True Culprit
achievements.description: Discover the true entity behind the maidens' capture.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: Bested Ganon
achievements.description: Defeat Ganon without being harmed without using the Magic Cape or Cane of Byrna.

achievements.title: The Golden Age
achievements.description: Return the Golden Land to its former glory.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: Rupee Hoarder
achievements.description: Have 999 rupees.

achievements.title: The Swordsmith's Brother
achievements.description: Obtain the Tempered Sword.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: Golden Wish
achievements.description: Obtain the Golden Sword.
achievements.author: dude1286

achievements.title: Love the Past
achievements.description: Have all 20 Heart Containers.
achievements.author: HenrySwanson

achievements.title: Ready to Blow!
achievements.description: Increase your maximum bomb capacity to 50.
achievements.author: AntTanGames

achievements.title: Full Quiver
achievements.description: Increase your maximum arrow capacity to 70.
achievements.author: AntTanGames

achievements.title: I Shoulda Saved the Others Too? Well Excuuuuse Me, Princess!
achievements.description: Rescue Zelda in Turtle Rock before any other maiden.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Jack of All Trades
achievements.description: Complete Ganon's Tower without ever entering while possessing a sword, exiting, or dying. Must start and finish in one attempt, entirely swordless.

achievements.title: Link Builds a Treasure Hoard
achievements.description: Obtain all key items, equipment, and their upgrades.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Link's Not Old Enough To Drink
achievements.description: Defeat Ganon with a silver arrow and reach the Triforce without having collected any bottles during the game.

achievements.title: Now You're Playing With Power
achievements.description: Enter Chris Houlihan's secret room.
achievements.author: AntTanGames
